title: Live results: Roy seeks GOP nod in Texas attorney general primary
author: The Hill Staff
fullText: Republican Rep. Chip Roy is facing off in a Tuesday GOP primary in an effort to replace Attorney General Ken Paxton this November. Other GOP candidates include state Sens. Joan Huffman and Mayes Middleton, as well as Aaron Reitz, who previously worked for the Justice Department. On the Democratic side, contenders include attorney Tony Box,…
